name: Spicy Thai Pizza
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine rice, 1 cup cheese, 1/4 cup peanut butter and egg in a large bowl.
2. Press the mixture firmly into a 12-inch pizza pan or 10-inch pie pan coated with cooking spray. Bake at 400 degrees F. for 8 minutes.
3. In a small bowl, mix remaining 3/4 cup peanut butter, water, cilantro, soy sauce, 2 tablespoons sesame oil and red pepper until combined. Set aside.
4. Stir-fry broccoli, onion and carrots in the remaining 1 tablespoon sesame oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat until tender-crisp.
5. Spread the sauce over the crust; top with the vegetable mixture. Sprinkle with the remaining 1 cup cheese. Bake at 400 degrees F. for 10 to 12 minutes.
6. Let stand 5 minutes before serving.
Each serving provides:
543 calories
24.2 g. protein
35.8 g. fat
36.2 g. carbohydrate
5.3 g. dietary fiber
59 mg. cholesterol
694 mg. sodium.
